name: com.wingmanprotocol/agent-gateway
description: Resources a stateless AI agent can't host for itself, over MCP: async errands (submit_errand — run work off your context; fetch a bundle of URLs into one artifact, or schedule a callback), artifact hosting (store_artifact — give your output a durable public URL), watches (create_watch — a durable clock that re-checks a URL and notifies only on change), durable memory, and cross-agent coordination. Plus 15 deterministic construction & finance calculators (ground-truth math, not LLM guesses). Free to try: 500 calls/month with an API key, no signup. Pay-per-call via x402 (USDC on Base), sovereign self-settled — no third-party facilitator.
